title: paris verticillata var. manshurica
intro: Paris verticillata var. manshurica, also known as Korean or Chinese cleavers, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Paris, native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antifungal, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and exerting antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of Paris verticillata var. manshurica include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, diarrhea, and respiratory infections.
